decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id (corridor_125th-st-manhattan) already exists in the registry with the same source (2012_09_19_125th_st_sbs_public_workshop_summary), same corridor_name '125th Street', same borough 'Manhattan', and matching description referencing the September 2012 public workshop. The closest canonical match is the observation's own base_record_id, so per rules the decision is new — the observation already resolves to that id and no different target link is needed.

evidence_refs.source_quote: critical issues impacting bus movement on 125th Street
